title: India's NavIC satellite system faces challenge as IRNSS-1F failed after atomic clock malfunction: what we know
summary: India's NavIC GPS alternative faces challenges after satellite IRNSS-1F failed, reducing operational satellites to three. A minimum of four is needed for complete coverage.
